summary: Iteration 60 - Aurex One-page Theme Phase 1+2. All 27 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified for Aurex Sections Manager (7 tabs, config forms, items CRUD) and Section Order Manager (Aurex mode with 15 sections, 7 swatch buttons per section, font dropdowns, preview chips).

issues: Console warning: hydration error with <span> inside <select>/<option> - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: admin_tools.py: AUREX_DEFAULT_ORDER correctly defines 15 sections including 7 new aurex_ sections
admin_tools.py: section-config endpoints store per-section bg_color, font_family, enabled under section_configs.{theme}
aurex_sections.py: VALID_SECTIONS and ITEM_SECTIONS correctly separate config-only (aurex_events) from items sections
aurex_sections.py: create_item auto-increments order and sets visible=true by default
aurex_sections.py: public_section filters visible!=false items and pulls calendar_events for aurex_events
public.py: /public/sections returns active_theme, section_order (theme-specific), and section_configs
AurexSectionsManager.js: Polymorphic schema-driven UI with 7 tabs, config forms, and items CRUD
SectionOrderManager.js: Theme scope selector switches between legacy and Aurex mode
SectionOrderManager.js: Aurex mode shows 7 swatch buttons (AUREX_PALETTE) and 5 font options per section
themeColors.js: AUREX_PALETTE has 7 swatches (white → gray_900), AUREX_FONTS has 5 fonts
themeColors.js: aurexContrastFor() returns 'light' or 'dark' based on bg luminance for auto-contrast
api.js: All Aurex admin methods (getAurexConfig, saveAurexConfig, getAurexItems, createAurexItem, etc.) properly defined
AdminLayout.js: 'Aurex Sections' sidebar entry with Sparkles icon at line 52
seed_data_creation: Test items created and cleaned up during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 60 features verified: (1) GET /api/admin/section-order?theme=aurex returns 15-section Aurex default order, (2) PUT /api/admin/section-order with theme=aurex persists per-theme ordering, (3) GET/PUT /api/admin/section-config for theme=aurex persists bg_color, font_family, enabled per section, (4) GET /api/public/sections returns active_theme, section_order, section_configs, (5) All 7 Aurex section configs work (aurex_audience, aurex_process, aurex_pricing, aurex_team, aurex_events, aurex_partners, aurex_clients), (6) Items CRUD works for 6 sections with auto-order and visible=true default, (7) aurex_events rejects items endpoints with 400 (config-only), (8) Reorder endpoint re-indexes items, (9) Public endpoints return only visible items, (10) aurex_events pulls from calendar_events with max_items and only_upcoming config, (11) Frontend /admin/aurex-sections shows 7 tabs with correct labels, (12) Config-only section (aurex_events) has no Add button, (13) Items sections have Add/Edit/Delete buttons, (14) Frontend /admin/section-order Aurex mode shows 15 cards with 7 swatch buttons each, font dropdown, and preview chip. Note: Phase 3 (public site rendering) and Phase 4 (animations/responsive) NOT built yet - only CMS admin UI tested.

backend: PUT /api/admin/section-order with theme=aurex - persists per-theme ordering
PUT /api/admin/section-config - saves bg_color, font_family, enabled per section
GET /api/admin/aurex/{section}/config - returns {} or config with section key (all 7 sections)
PUT /api/admin/aurex/{section}/config - saves config with section discriminator
PUT /api/admin/aurex/{section}/reorder - re-indexes based on order array
GET /api/public/aurex/aurex_audience - returns {config, items} with only visible items
GET /api/public/aurex/aurex_events - pulls from calendar_events with max_items + only_upcoming
frontend: Admin /admin/aurex-sections - Aurex Sections Manager loads with data-testid
Aurex Sections Manager - 7 tabs present (aurex_audience, aurex_process, aurex_pricing, aurex_team, aurex_events, aurex_partners, aurex_clients)
Aurex Sections Manager - Tab switching works correctly
aurex_audience tab - Has Add button for items CRUD
aurex_audience tab - Config form with Save config button
Add item dialog - Opens with fields and Create button
Section Order Manager - Theme scope selector present
Section Order Manager - Aurex theme selection works
Section Order Manager Aurex mode - 15 section items displayed
Section Order Manager Aurex mode - 105 swatch buttons (7 per section × 15)
Section Order Manager Aurex mode - 15 font dropdowns with 6 options each
Section Order Manager Aurex mode - 15 preview chips showing bg color + font
Section Order Manager Aurex mode - 15 section toggles for visibility
Section Order Manager - Save button present
Admin sidebar - 'Aurex Sections' entry with Sparkles icon
